textBox.richText: QUICK LIST of CHANGES (see the ChangeLog file in the distribution for a complete and detailed list) NEW FEATURES COMPILER - a prologue is now inserted at the beginning of each file generated by the compiler - #if/#else/#endif directives and [-D] option for conditional compilation (see Sec. 9.7 of LRM and examples/working/misc/ccond) - support for 3D arrays (see [examples/working/basic/lut4] and [examples/working/conv/conv_bank]) SYSTEMC - bug fix in class generation mechanism (when using polymorphic variants, in some cases the compiler emitted duplicate class declarations in file [xxx_globals.h]) - added option [-sc_fifo_stats_offset] to specify an offset to be added to the reported FIFO sizes when using the [-sc_dump_fifo_stats] (see Sec 9.8 of the LRM) VHDL - recrafted VHDL backend; the generated actors now process one token per clock cycle and do not register tokens on their I/O ports; as a result, applications may now operate at full clock speed; the "old" behavior (one token every two clock cycles) can be emulated using the [-istream_clock_period] option. - added option [-vhdl_istream_skew] to control the timing of input tokens at the test-bench level - added options [-vhdl_quartus] to generated Altera Quartus II specific file(s) (for now: [xxx_net.qip]) - removed package pody from [xxx_globals.vhd] when empty (this causes a warning under Quartus II) - bug fix for arrays of integers when the sign-ness/siez of integers is not specified VHDL LIBRARY added [conv213], [conv214] and [conv215] actors to [convol.cph] added a separate package [optimized] containing "custom" versions of specific actors, such as [d1l] back to two separate models for small and big FIFOs. Customization is provided by options [-vhdl_small_fifo_model], [-vhdl_big_fifo_model] and [-vhdl_fifo_model_threshold]. Option [-vhdl_default_fifo_model] is deprecated (see Sec 9.8 of the LRM). Thx to F. Berry and C. Bourrasset for providing and testing optimized versions of the FIFO models - removed file [split.vhd]; the [split] actors are now generated on the fly by the compiler in the application-specific file [xxx_splitters.vhd] (see Sec 9.4 of the LRM) SYSTEMC LIBRARY - removed file [split.h]; the [split] actors are now generated on the fly by the compiler in the application-specific file [xxx_splitters.h] (see Sec 9.3 of the LRM) EXAMPLES - example in [working/misc/implemented] illustrates usage of the "#pragma implemented" directive - example of 2D-histogramming in [working/app/histo2d] - examples [working/network/filter_bank2] and [working/basic/lut4] illustrating 3D arrays MISC - the [vhdl.viewtrace] target in [lib/etc/Makefile.core] now expects a .ghw file (as generated by GHDL when using the --wave option); displaying .vcd files is still possible by invoking the [vhdl.viewvcdtrace] - added a target [vhdl.quartus] in [lib/etc/Makefile.core] to automatize integration of VHDL generated code to Quartus II tool (with the help of predefined templates in [lib/etc/quartus])
